description: ContextOps context manifest for the Governed AMS Ticket Change Agent demo. Deterministic pre-checks: the agent may not act on context that is unowned, stale, or outside an operational window.

ticket.summary: Rotate SMTP relay credentials and apply config change on prod mail gateway

agent_binding.note: The AMS Ticket Change Agent runs at T1 (least agency). apply-change requires T3 — the gateway forces deterministic approval.
